About Me

masterforliage@gmail.com

I am Liuye Zhao, an undergraduate student majoring in Computer Science and Technology, Zhejiang University. I am now advised by Professor Xiaogang Jin.

My current research focuses on rendering related to deep learning, aiming to realize the visual world using physical simulation and deep learning. This work is highly valuable in creating 3D and even 4D world models. Futhermore, I tend to explore various interesting rendering techniques that maximize rendering speed while ensuring high-quality visual effects. This work has significant applications in mobile rendering, film and television production, and animation.

I am also interested in various geometric processing methods in computer graphics.

Last updated: May 2026

University of Utah
UTAH

I will be attending Kahlert School of Computing, University of Utah as a visiting scholar during the summer of 2026, where I will complete a student internship of several months under the guidance of Professor Yin Yang. I hope I will have a fulfilling and enjoyable internship experience!
